author: claude
content:
Arity/name artifacts (#56 sub-items ii): BOTH reproduced empirically (direct-selenium, FF152, real compiled getInstrumentJS injected as inline script, no extension).

Before fix: native getImageData .length=4 -> wrapper 0; .name="getImageData" -> ""; toDataURL .name="toDataURL" -> "". After fix: all match native; calls still logged (no capture regression).

Fixed in instrumentFunction (Extension/src/lib/js-instruments.ts:436): copy native length/name own-descriptors onto the wrapper (native non-writable/non-enumerable/configurable shape). Added browser regression test TestJSInstrumentFunctionArityAndName (verified it FAILS without the fix). Full test_js_instrument.py suite green (8).

Draft PR: https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1210

Still tradeoff-blocked (out of scope, unchanged): proto-chain flattening (sub-item iii) -- de-polluting it drops inherited-member capture collection_fingerprinting relies on. See datadir/r56-protochain-flattening-verdict.md.
